description: Style Note Take edgy dressing to the next level in these blue jeans from spykar. This pair of jeans in blue is perfect for casual outings with friends. Team this pair with a grunge tee, funky jewellery and leather boots for a great rocker look. Product Description Lightly washed dark blue stretchy jeans, has a buttoned and zippered closure, belt loops at the waist, two insert pockets in the front with a coin pocket inside the right insert pocket, low waistline, brand patch at the waist in the back and two patch pockets at the back with stitched detailing Material and Care 98% cotton and 2% spandex Wash using a mild detergent separately Do not bleach and dry under shade Use warm iron Size and Fit Spykar Tight fit The model (height 5'8& rdquo and waist 28") is wearing a size 28
